sdmodels.name: Juggernaut_X_RunDiffusion_Hyper
sdmodels.description:
As you may have already noticed, Juggernaut XI has been available on several platforms (NightCafe, Octo API) for the past few weeks. I could tell you a lot about it, but let's keep it simple. I’m now working on this full-time, which means I need to make money from it—not just to pay for the training (which I’m still funding myself) but also to cover my rent and put some food on the table. 
 url of model :https://civitai.com/models/133005?modelVersionId=471120

sdmodels.name: dreamshaperXL_v21TurboDPMSDE
sdmodels.description:
It's Turbotime Turbo version should be used at CFG scale 2 and with around 4-8 sampling steps. This should work only with DPM++ SDE Karras (NOT 2M). You can use this with LCM sampler, but don't do it unless you need speed vs quality. Sampler comparison at 8 steps: https://civitai.com/posts/951781 UPDATE: Lightning version targets 3-6 sampling steps at CFG scale 2 and should also work only with DPM++ SDE Karras. Avoid going too far above 1024 in either direction for the 1st step. No need to use refiner and this model itself can be used for highres fix and tiled upscaling. Examples have been generated using Auto1111, but you can achieve similar results with this ComfyUI Workflow: https://pastebin.com/79XN01xs 
 url model : https://civitai.com/models/112902/dreamshaper-xl

typecontrols.description:
Instant ID uses a combination of ControlNet and IP-Adapter to control the facial features in the diffusion process. One unique design for Instant ID is that it passes facial embedding from IP-Adapter projection as crossattn input to the ControlNet unet. Normally the crossattn input to the ControlNet unet is prompt's text embedding.
 url : https://civitai.com/models/301713/instant-id-sdxl

models.name: Model One
models.prompt: Create a professional corporate headshot in a natural studio setting. The subject is wearing a dark blue business suit, a white dress shirt, and a patterned blue tie. Ensure soft, even lighting with a simple light gray background, emphasizing the professional attire. The image should have a clean, polished, and realistic look, with accurate skin tones, smooth and natural face texture, and a neutral, professional expression. Focus on clarity in the suit and tie, while avoiding any alterations to the subject's natural face appearance, Hyper-realistic, High-resolution
models.negative_prompt: (NSFW, horn, censored, Naked:1.5), Avoid over-stylization, artistic filters, unrealistic lighting, or exaggerated contrasts—no cartoonish, abstract, or digital art effects. Exclude any dramatic shadows, soft focus, or unnatural poses. Do not include bright, vibrant backgrounds or complex environments. Avoid casual or informal attire—no additional props, distractions, or non-business-related elements. Maintain a professional, clean, and neutral look, ( Cropped, Out of frame, Out of focus:1.2), wrong colors, red skin, uneven texture, eye deformation, asymmetry, exaggerated expressions, awkward smile, tense expression, harsh lighting, pixelation, over-processed, artificial look, cartoonish, blemishes, unnatural shadows, blotchy skin, wrong face texture.( Ugly, Fake Eye, deformed pupil, fake pupil:1.2)
